title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Glenmark Pharmaceuticals

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Glenmark Pharmaceuticals
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Glenmark Pharmaceuticals in Nagpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Glenmark Pharmaceuticals:
Glenmark Pharmaceuticals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Glenmark Pharmaceuticals!
